data.title: Add story validation failure detection and TDD remediation routing to sprint SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description
Add logic to sprint SKILL.md that detects when all tasks for a story are closed but story-level validation fails, and routes to implementation-plan to create TDD remediation tasks (RED test first, then implementation).

## TDD Requirement
Eval RED test from task eea2-aa45 must be written first. This task makes that eval pass (GREEN).

## Implementation
Modify plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md to add story validation failure detection in the post-batch flow (Phase 5 or Step 10a area):

### Story Validation Failure Detection
After closing tasks for a story (Step 10a), if the completion-verifier returns overall_verdict: FAIL for the story:
1. Do NOT close the story
2. Log: "Story <id> validation failed despite all tasks closed — creating TDD remediation tasks"
3. Record REPLAN_TRIGGER: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "REPLAN_TRIGGER: validation — Story <id> validation failed with all tasks closed. Creating TDD remediation tasks."
4. Invoke /dso:implementation-plan via Skill tool on the story to create remediation tasks
5. The implementation-plan re-invocation guard will detect existing closed children and produce a diff plan (new tasks only for uncovered success criteria)
6. After re-planning, record: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "REPLAN_RESOLVED: implementation-plan — Remediation tasks created for story <id>"
7. Return to Phase 3 (Batch Preparation) to execute the new remediation tasks

### TDD Remediation Flow
Implementation-plan creates remediation tasks following standard TDD:
- RED test task first (tests the failing validation criterion)
- Implementation task depends on the RED test
- This is handled by implementation-plan's standard task drafting — no special logic needed in sprint

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains story validation failure detection logic
  Verify: grep -q 'validation.*fail.*all tasks closed\|story.*validation.*remediation' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md records REPLAN_TRIGGER: validation comment
  Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_TRIGGER: validation' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md records REPLAN_RESOLVED after remediation
  Verify: grep -q 'REPLAN_RESOLVED.*implementation-plan' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md routes to implementation-plan for TDD remediation task creation
  Verify: grep -q 'implementation-plan.*remediation\|remediation.*implementation-plan' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Sprint eval validation failure test passes (GREEN)
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
